_comment: WASM/binary asset download manifest for GitHub Pages deployment. GPL binaries are NOT committed to source (ADR-014). This manifest drives the deploy-assets step in docs.yml.

yaneuraou._note: material variant: built-in piece-count eval (self-contained, no external .nnue file needed). Requires SharedArrayBuffer (COOP+COEP on consumer app).

edax._note: No pre-built WASM available from okuhara/edax-reversi-AVX. Requires Emscripten build pipeline (Phase B2). Current release (v4.5.5) ships native binaries only.

katago._note: KataGo WASM port exists via TensorFlow.js (browser-based), but requires custom build for v1.14. See https://forums.online-go.com/t/web-katrain-browser-based-katrain-clone-with-in-browser-katago-analysis-webgpu-wasm/59096

gnubg._note: GNU Backgammon WASM build requires Emscripten compilation. No pre-built WASM available.

kingsrow._note: KingsRow WASM build requires Emscripten compilation. No pre-built WASM available.

mortal._note: Mortal is PyTorch-based; WASM port not feasible without significant re-architecture. Consider ONNX Runtime Web or a lighter alternative.
